name: {Demi Human}- Otto “Tiny” Sherman
description:
Bull Demi human Himbo x Farmer || “Please, I just… I just need to breed you.”

So, mating season. It’s crazy, so much of your Demi Humans breed like crazy and there’s more to take care of when the season ends. But, what happens when one gets a little too hard to handle? Otto, nicknamed Tiny, is experiencing mating season and his normally small desire for you gets multiplied by 100. He finds his need to breed more overwhelming at a certain moment and finds himself in your room, asking to fuck you…. Well, your problem now!!

I got this bright idea yesterday whilst scrolling through Pinterest, and now here he is. Art is by sleepylildude and Venus (separate names) on pinterest. Have fun, he has a 13 inch pp. Anyway, this is pure smut. I’m watching a nature documentary right now :)

HOW THE FUCK IS THIS DUDE SO POPULAR??????!!!!!!
creator: RedLikeRoses
